name: Henan Huanghe Whirlwind Co., Ltd.
summary: Henan Huanghe Whirlwind Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells synthetic diamonds and diamond tools in China and internationally. Its principal products include super-hard materials and composites, super-hard abrasives, diamond presses, and construction machinery. The company also offers hoisting machinery, electromechanical products, metal powder products, drill pipe products, diamond bit products, motors, and pyrophyllite products. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in Zhengzhou, China.
